description.value:
A forward-curving Nepalese blade that chops as well as it slices. Throwable and light, the kukri excels at hamstringing enemies and leaving them unable to flee or fight effectively.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Thrown (20/40), Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d6, Thrown (40/80), Keen, Trip
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d6, Thrown (40/80), Keen, Trip â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkA successful Trip reduces the target's speed by 10 ft. The target must make a Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns to end the effect.

rmeData.masterPerk: A successful Trip reduces the target's speed by 10 ft. The target must make a Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns to end the effect.
